name: dypa-golearn-automation
description: Portable Playwright automation starter for edu.golearn.gr workflows.

scripts.test:unit: node tests/unit/sessionPolicy.unit.test.js && node tests/unit/retryPolicy.unit.test.js && node tests/unit/progressStore.unit.test.js && node tests/unit/runtimeState.unit.test.js && node tests/unit/settingsStore.unit.test.js && node tests/unit/rendererHeartbeat.unit.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e-ui && npm run test:phase2 && npm run test:phase3 && npm run test:phase5 && npm run test:ux-smoke
scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/runtimeState.js && node --check src/progressStore.js && node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/renderer/renderer.js
scripts.quality:gate: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:all
